key_features: Real-time torque calibration feedback via integrated display
Bluetooth sync to maintenance management systems
Ergonomic anti-fatigue grip designed for 8-hour shift use
Auto-shutdown memory saves last 50 torque readings
Compatible with ISO, DIN, and ANSI fastener standards
brief.target_audience: Industrial maintenance engineers, MRO procurement managers, aerospace assembly technicians
brief.usp: The only torque wrench with real-time calibration drift detection — catches calibration errors before they cause failures
brief.extra_context: ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturing. Used by Tier-1 aerospace OEMs and 4,000+ MRO facilities worldwide. 3-year calibration warranty. ATEX certified for explosive atmospheres.

brand_voice.tone: Authoritative and precise — we speak to engineers who distrust marketing language
brand_voice.style: Technical depth first. Factual claims only. Short declarative sentences. No superlatives unless verifiable. Metrics wherever possible.
brand_voice.sample_copy: The ForgeTorque Pro 3000 delivers ±0.5% accuracy across its full torque range — a specification independently verified to ISO 6789-2:2017. When calibration drift exceeds 0.3%, the integrated display alerts the operator before the fastener is applied. This is not a feature. It is a requirement for aerospace-grade assembly.
